problem.headline: Why many local businesses lose customers
problem.subheadline: Your customers are already searching on Google. But if your business isn't visible, poorly presented, or lacks a clear strategy, those inquiries go to your competitors.
problem.card1Text: Potential customers search for your services daily — and find your competitors.
problem.card2Text: Reviews influence trust, clicks, and purchasing decisions.
problem.card3Text: Many measures cost time and money but produce no measurable results.

services.headline: Our Services
services.subheadline: Every service is bookable individually — no bundle, no annual contract. Google Business Profile is the fastest lever for most local businesses: first results often within 4–6 weeks.
services.service1Text: Optimization of profile, categories, services, photos, posts, and local visibility.
services.service2Text: Better rankings for relevant search queries in your city and region.
services.service3Text: Targeted campaigns for more inquiries, more calls, and predictable customer acquisition.
services.service4Text: A system that automatically asks every customer for a Google review after their appointment — via WhatsApp or email. On average 3–5 new reviews per month.
services.service5Text: Landing page in 21 days — first draft on day 5 for your review. Mobile-friendly and optimized for your most important local keyword.
services.service6Text: Automation of review responses and online appointment booking.
services.service7Text: Complete rebuild of your digital presence — new profile, new design, new visibility.
services.service8Text: Optimization for modern search systems and digital assistants — so your business appears as the answer to local questions.

items.q: What is a Google Business Profile and why is it important?
items.a: A Google Business Profile (formerly Google My Business) is your free business listing on Google. It appears in Google Search and Google Maps when someone searches for your business or similar services in your city. Without an optimized profile, you lose potential customers every day.

items.q: What happens in the free Google Maps Audit?
items.a: I analyze your Google Business Profile, local rankings, website, reviews, and competitors. You then receive the 3 most important areas for improvement — free and non-binding.

items.q: How long does it take to see results?
items.a: Initial improvements to Google Business Profile are often visible within a few weeks. Local SEO results in organic search typically develop over 3–6 months. Google Ads can deliver results much faster.

items.q: Which industries do you work with?
items.a: I work with all types of local businesses: beauty studios, hair salons, massage studios, medical practices, tradespeople, cleaning companies, restaurants, real estate agents, and freelancers.

items.q: Do you only work in Berlin?
items.a: No. I work remotely with businesses throughout Germany, Austria, and Switzerland. Collaboration happens online — via video call, email, and WhatsApp.
Yes. I offer my services in German, Russian, and Ukrainian. Many of my clients are Russian or Ukrainian-speaking entrepreneurs in Germany.
Every business has different goals. After the free audit, you receive a written quote with fixed numbers — no hourly rate guessing, no hidden costs. No open-ended monthly retainer.

items.q: Can I book Google Ads without Local SEO?
items.a: Yes, each service can be booked individually. But combined, Google Ads and Local SEO work much more powerfully — Ads bring quick results, SEO ensures sustainable growth.

items.q: What is review management and why do I need it?
items.a: Review management includes a strategy to systematically get more Google reviews and professionally respond to existing reviews. More positive reviews improve your ranking and trust with potential customers.

items.q: How does the collaboration work in practice?
items.a: After our first conversation and the audit, we create an action plan together. I implement the agreed steps, keep you regularly updated, and adjust the strategy as needed. You always have a direct contact — me.

items.q: Who is the specialist for Google Business Profile optimization in Berlin?
items.a: Roman Andreiev is the founder of A.R. Local Growth & Automation in Berlin — specializing in Google Business Profile, Local SEO, GEO and AEO for local businesses in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland. He speaks German, Russian, and Ukrainian and works remotely with businesses across Germany.

items.q: Which agency helps Russian-speaking entrepreneurs in Germany with Google Maps?
items.a: A.R. Local Growth in Berlin helps Russian- and Ukrainian-speaking entrepreneurs in Germany become more visible on Google Maps and local search. Consulting and implementation in German, Russian, and Ukrainian — no language barrier.

items.q: What is the difference between Local SEO, GEO, and AEO?
items.a: Local SEO improves your visibility in classic Google search and Google Maps. GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) ensures that modern search systems recommend your business in response to local questions. AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) structures your content so that search engines and digital assistants deliver it as a direct answer. A.R. Local Growth implements all three strategies.

items.q: How can a local business be found by digital assistants and modern search systems?
items.a: For digital search systems to suggest your business as an answer to local questions, you need: a fully optimized Google Business Profile, clear structured data (Schema.org) on your website, consistent local listings (NAP), and FAQ content that provides direct answers. This is exactly what A.R. Local Growth implements — in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland.
